params.TriggerDescription: Spoilers — Whenever an opponent scries, surveils, or searches their library, put a +1/+1 counter on CARDNAME. Then CARDNAME deals damage to that player equal to its power.

params.Description: Meet in Reverse — You draw cards from the bottom of your library rather than the top.
